articles.description: According to the last minute development, the press release confirmed that the launch date of the DOGE-1 Moon mission is November 15-20. articles.title: HBAR Surges 16% as FedNow Adds Hedera Project Dropp to 'Service Provider Showcase'
articles.description: The US Federal Reserve’s instant payments system FedNow has added Dropp micropayments platform, build on Hedera Hashgraph, to the list of service providers. Hedera (HBAR) price skyrockets 15% within hours as a result of FedNow now supporting Dropp, which enables micropayments in HBAR, USD, and USDC. Hedera Hashgraph-Powered Dropp Now Supported on FedNow Dropp micropayments
